authority.all_expression:
fields @timestamp, @@m as Message, @@l as level, Version, RequestPath, RequestId, ConnectionId, EventId, @@tr as TR, @@sp as SP, @@t as T, @message  
| sort @timestamp desc
authority.error_expression:
fields @timestamp, @@m as Message, @@l as level, Version, RequestPath, RequestId, ConnectionId, EventId, @@tr as TR, @@sp as SP, @@t as T, @message  
| filter level = "Error" 
| sort @timestamp desc 
| limit 5
authority.title: Authority
authority.warning_expression:
fields @timestamp, @@m as Message, @@l as level, Version, RequestPath, RequestId, ConnectionId, EventId, @@tr as TR, @@sp as SP, @@t as T, @message  
| filter level = "Warning" 
| sort @timestamp desc 
| limit 5

cfs.expression:
fields @timestamp, @message 
| filter @message not like "ELB-HealthChecker"
| sort @timestamp desc
cfs.title: CFS

cfs-scheduler.expression:
fields @timestamp, @message 
| filter @message not like "ELB-HealthChecker"
| sort @timestamp desc
cfs-scheduler.title: CFS Scheduler

cloudbeaver.error_expression:
fields @timestamp, @message
| filter @message like "err" or @message like "ERR" or @message like "Err"
| sort @timestamp desc
| limit 5
cloudbeaver.title: Cloud-Beaver
cloudbeaver.warning_expression:
fields @timestamp, @message
| filter @message like "warn" or @message like "WARN" or @message like "Warn"
| sort @timestamp desc
| limit 5

fts.expression:
fields @timestamp, @message 
| filter @message not like "ELB-HealthChecker" and @message not like "GET /javascripts/" and @message not like "GET /libraries/" and @message not like "GET /stylesheets/" and @message not like "GET /fonts/" 
| sort @timestamp desc

grafana.error_expression:
fields @timestamp, @message
| parse @message "level=* msg=\"*\"" as log_level, log_message, more
| filter log_level like "err"
| sort @timestamp desc
| limit 5
grafana.title: Grafana
grafana.warning_expression:
fields @timestamp, @message
| parse @message "level=* msg=\"*\"" as log_level, log_message, more
| filter log_level like "warn"
| sort @timestamp desc
| limit 5
